10:["$","$L9",null,{"children":["$","section",null,{"className":"mb-16","children":[["$","$La",null,{"title":"确定性抽卡系统","subtitle":"基于 Mulberry32 的伪随机数生成"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"space-y-6 text-[var(--text-secondary)] leading-relaxed","children":[["$","p",null,{"children":["Buddy 系统的核心是一个"," ",["$","strong",null,{"className":"text-[var(--text-primary)]","children":"确定性随机数生成器"}],"（Deterministic PRNG）。与 JavaScript 内置的"," ",["$","code",null,{"className":"px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded bg-[var(--card-bg)] border border-[var(--card-border)] text-sm font-mono text-[var(--accent-cyan)]","children":"Math.random()"}]," ","不同，Mulberry32 算法使用固定种子，确保相同的输入始终产生相同的输出。 这意味着每个用户 ID 都会对应一个唯一的、可复现的伙伴。"]}],["$","p",null,{"children":"为什么选择确定性而非真随机？因为确定性保证了公平性和可验证性—— 每个用户的伙伴由其 ID 唯一决定，不存在重复或遗漏，也不需要服务器端的状态存储。"}]]}],["$","$L1c",null,{"title":"Mulberry32 PRNG 算法流程","nodes":[{"id":"input","label":"seed (32-bit int)","x":40,"y":30,"color":"var(--accent-cyan)"},{"id":"add","label":"seed += 0x6D2B79F5","x":220,"y":30,"color":"var(--accent-cyan)"},{"id":"imul","label":"Math.imul 变换","x":400,"y":30,"color":"var(--accent-purple)"},{"id":"xor1","label":"XOR + 位运算","x":40,"y":110,"color":"var(--accent-purple)"},{"id":"imul2","label":"Math.imul 二次变换","x":220,"y":110,"color":"var(--accent-purple)"},{"id":"shift","label":"右移 + XOR","x":400,"y":110,"color":"var(--accent-blue)"},{"id":"output","label":"[0, 1) 浮点数","x":220,"y":190,"color":"var(--accent-blue)"}],"edges":[{"from":"input","to":"add","label":"位或 0"},{"from":"add","to":"imul","label":"异或移位"},{"from":"imul","to":"xor1","label":"t = imul(...)"},{"from":"xor1","to":"imul2","label":"61 | t"},{"from":"imul2","to":"shift","label":"XOR t"},{"from":"shift","to":"output","label":"/ 2^32"}],"width":560,"height":270}],["$","div",null,{"className":"mt-6","children":["$","$L1c",null,{"title":"抽卡流程：从用户 ID 到伙伴诞生","nodes":[{"id":"uid","label":"用户 ID 字符串","x":40,"y":30,"color":"var(--text-secondary)"},{"id":"hash","label":"hashCode()","x":220,"y":30,"color":"var(--accent-cyan)"},{"id":"init","label":"mulberry32(seed)","x":420,"y":30,"color":"var(--accent-cyan)"},{"id":"s1","label":"rng() → 物种","x":40,"y":120,"color":"var(--accent-purple)"},{"id":"s2","label":"rng() → 稀有度","x":220,"y":120,"color":"var(--accent-yellow, #f59e0b)"},{"id":"s3","label":"rng() < 0.01 → 闪光","x":420,"y":120,"color":"var(--accent-yellow, #f59e0b)"},{"id":"s4","label":"rng() × 5 → 属性","x":140,"y":210,"color":"var(--accent-blue)"},{"id":"result","label":"完整 Buddy 对象","x":380,"y":210,"color":"var(--accent-purple)"}],"edges":[{"from":"uid","to":"hash","label":"char 迭代"},{"from":"hash","to":"init","label":"32-bit 种子"},{"from":"init","to":"s1","label":"rng() ⨯ 18"},{"from":"init","to":"s2","label":"rng() 分层"},{"from":"init","to":"s3","label":"1% 判定"},{"from":"init","to":"s4","label":"连续 5 次"},{"from":"s1","to":"result","label":""},{"from":"s2","to":"result","label":""},{"from":"s3","to":"result","label":""},{"from":"s4","to":"result","label":""}],"width":600,"height":300}]}]]}]}]
11:["$","$L9",null,{"children":["$","section",null,{"className":"mb-16","children":[["$","$La",null,{"title":"物种与稀有度","subtitle":"18 个物种，五个稀有度等级"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"space-y-6 text-[var(--text-secondary)] leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":["Buddy 系统包含"," ",["$","strong",null,{"className":"text-[var(--text-primary)]","children":"18 个独特物种"}],"，每个物种都属于五个稀有度等级之一。稀有度不仅影响获取概率， 还决定了伙伴的视觉特效和动画复杂度。此外，任何稀有度的伙伴都有"," ",["$","strong",null,{"className":"text-[var(--text-primary)]","children":"1% 的独立几率"}]," ","成为闪光（Shiny）变体，拥有独特的外观颜色。"]}]}],["$","$L1c",null,{"title":"稀有度概率分布","nodes":[{"id":"roll","label":"rng() → [0, 1)","x":280,"y":20,"color":"var(--accent-cyan)"},{"id":"common","label":"Common 12:["$","$L9",null,{"children":["$","section",null,{"className":"mb-16","children":[["$","$La",null,{"title":"五维属性系统","subtitle":"过程化生成的伙伴个性"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"space-y-6 14:["$","$L9",null,{"children":["$","section",null,{"className":"mb-16","children":[["$","$La",null,{"title":"设计哲学","subtitle":"为什么在一个 CLI 工具里放 Tamagotchi？"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"space-y-6 工具不仅是生产力的延伸，也可以是情感的寄托。"}]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"mt-6 grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-4","children":[["$","div","情感连接",{"className":"p-6 rounded-xl border border-[var(--card-border)] PRNG，每个用户的伙伴完全由其 ID 决定——不需要服务器存储，不存在重复抽取，也不可能出现暗箱操作。代码就是公平的保证。"}]]}],["$","div","能力展示",{"className":"p-6 rounded-xl border border-[var(--card-border)] Claude Code 的工程能力和创意思维。"}]]}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"mt-8","children":["$","$L1c",null,{"title":"Buddy
